title: ajuga multiflora
intro: Ajuga multiflora, also known as bugleweed or multifloral bugle, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ajuga multiflora include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Ajuga multiflora include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
